evals.prompt: Get this Sunday's rotation due list: `python3 scripts/peer_tracker.py rotation-due --week 2026-W17`
evals.expected_output: Returns 4-5 creator names sorted by last_refreshed_at ascending (oldest first), drawn from the 15 creators in references/tracked-creators.md. Output is JSON with creator name, handle, channel, last_refreshed_at.

assertions.name: returns_4_or_5_creators
assertions.description: Output contains 4 creators (or 5 every other week per rotation rule)

assertions.name: sorted_oldest_first
assertions.description: Creators sorted by last_refreshed_at ascending — oldest refresh date appears first

assertions.name: from_tracked_15
assertions.description: All returned creators are members of the 15-creator list in references/tracked-creators.md

assertions.name: json_shape
assertions.description: Each creator entry has fields: name, handle, channel, last_refreshed_at

evals.prompt: Apply a refresh for one creator: `python3 scripts/peer_tracker.py apply-refresh --creator 'Justin Welsh' --findings '{...top 3 posts, signature delta, status: active...}'`
evals.expected_output: Updates the Justin Welsh section of post-writer/references/creator-study.md IN PLACE (recent samples + signature format + last_refreshed). Bumps last_refreshed_at in data/refresh-log.json. Does NOT rewrite the file from scratch — preserves any manual edits to other creators' sections.

assertions.name: in_place_update
assertions.description: Only Justin Welsh's section is modified in creator-study.md; other 14 creators' sections byte-identical

assertions.name: last_refreshed_bumped
assertions.description: data/refresh-log.json: Justin Welsh's last_refreshed_at updated to current ISO timestamp

assertions.name: no_full_rewrite
assertions.description: File diff shows only Justin Welsh subsection changed, not whole-file replacement

assertions.name: status_preserved_or_set
assertions.description: If findings include status (active/silent/pivoted), it is recorded in his subsection
